titles.title: Game Sekai Tensei "Dankatsu": Gamer wa "Dungeon Shuukatsu no Susume" wo "Hajime kara" Play suru
Reincarnation in the Game World Dankatsu: Game Addict Plays "Encouragement for Job Hunting in Dungeons" from a "New Game"
ゲーム世界転生〈ダン活〉～ゲーマーは【ダンジョン就活のススメ】を〈はじめから〉プレイする

data.title: Game Sekai Tensei "Dankatsu": Gamer wa "Dungeon Shuukatsu no Susume" wo "Hajime kara" Play suru
data.title_japanese: ゲーム世界転生〈ダン活〉～ゲーマーは【ダンジョン就活のススメ】を〈はじめから〉プレイする
title_synonyms: Reincarnation in the Game World Dankatsu: Game Addict Plays "Encouragement for Job Hunting in Dungeons" from a "New Game"
data.synopsis:
After finding himself reincarnated as the protagonist of the god-tier game "Dungeon Job Hunting Recommendation", aka "DanKatsu", Zephyrus is far from intimidated. Instead, he's absolutely thrilled! As a seasoned gamer who knows every nook and cranny of this world, he now has the chance to live within a massive system featuring an unprecedented 1,021 playable classes and over 400 different endings.

Armed with an encyclopedic knowledge of the game's mechanics, Zephyrus wastes no time enrolling in the Labyrinth Academy, the central stage where the real adventure begins. He has his sights set on a single goal: securing the fabled "Hero" class. Alongside his childhood friend, whom he guides toward the Alchemist path, Zephyrus is ready to sweep up rare loot and power-level at a breakneck pace!

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Komekami! Girls
data.synopsis:
This is the story of the seven-sister unit "Komekami! Girls," children of the rice deity, born from the tradition: "In a single grain of rice, seven gods reside."

When their mother(the deity of rice, or the rice-god queen) was called back in haste to the celestial realm and no longer able to return to the earthly realm they search for her traces using Usa City (Oita Prefecture) as their base, and teleport to Hachiman shrines throughout Kyushu island. As they solve local problems, they learn about food, take part in cooking battles, and grow.

titles.title: So What's Wrong with Getting Reborn as a Goblin?
転生ゴブリンだけど質問ある？

data.title: Tensei Goblin dakedo Shitsumon Aru?
data.title_japanese: 転生ゴブリンだけど質問ある？
title_synonyms: So What's Wrong with Getting Reborn as a Goblin?
data.synopsis:
Office worker Akira Yagami's altruistic nature usually gets him the short end of the stick. When he dies after saving a kid from oncoming traffic...he reincarnates in another world as a goblin?! Normally, goblins only live for seven days, but Akira's newfound powers let him defy the species' normal life span... and are the key to his path to becoming the strongest goblin ever!

(Source: Yen Press)

data.title: Junket Bank
data.synopsis:
Karasu Bank is one of Japan's leading banks, boasting the third-highest operating profits in the country. Akira Mitarai is a young employee in his second year at the bank's central branch. His exceptional math skills allow him to instantly spot accounting errors but also make his day-to-day life incredibly boring.

One day, Akira is suddenly transferred to the Special Operations Department's "Appraisal Unit," which he is told is a key department within the bank. Suspicious of his transfer and the unfamiliar department, he is told by his new boss that the bank actually operates a massive underground casino, and that the Appraisal Unit is the department responsible for managing this gambling as well as the gamblers who participate in it. But these gamblers are putting more than just their money on the line, with their very lives serving as collateral to play! Higher risk means higher rewards, but at the top level losing is a death sentence.

Overwhelmed and confused by the strange state of the bank's secret casino, Mitarai meets a mysterious, genius gambler, Shin Mafutsu. Enraptured by Shin's ability to see through his opponents' cheating and emerge victorious, Akira decides to enter the world of life-or-death gambling as Shin's bank representative.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Isekai Tensei Soudouki
data.synopsis:
Bard Cornelius: the son of a nobleman of Mauricia, an empire located in a parallel universe. But Bard is no ordinary boy—he's got three souls packed into one body! Aside from his own consciousness, he's got Oka Sanai, a miserly samurai, and Masaharu Oka, a high school otaku who loves animal ears. With his extra knowledge of military tactics and business acumen, Bard's ready to cheat his way to the top! Get ready to enjoy the manga version of this hit isekai light novel series!

(Source: One Peace Books)

data.title: Sword Art Online: Unanswered//butterfly
data.synopsis:
The world's first full-dive VRMMO, Sword Art Online—known as SAO. What was meant to be a dream come true has instead transformed into a deadly game where dying in the virtual world means dying in reality.

Emirun and Rex, who once knew each other in the real world, reunite by chance within SAO. They join a scouting party to learn how to survive in this unforgiving world. One day, however, they encounter a mysterious PK (Player Killer) known only as the Black Swordsman. When Emirun rushes to the scene, she finds Rex collapsed in despair, and the Black Swordsman standing over him. The one who wiped out their entire scouting party—was the Black Swordsman.

Determined to avenge their fallen comrades, Emirun and Rex seek out the legendary prodigy swordswoman Asuna, and begin intense training under her guidance. In a death game where even players turn against one another, what new beginning will these two reach at the end of their struggle…?

(Source: Official Site, translated)
data.background: Serves as a promotional tie-in movie for the game "Sword Art Online: Echoes of Aincrad."

data.title: Senaka ni Ribbon
data.synopsis: Music video for CHARA and YUKI's collaboration song Senaka ni Ribbon.

titles.title: もし、これから生まれるのなら

data.title: Moshi, Korekara Umareru no Nara
data.title_japanese: もし、これから生まれるのなら
data.synopsis:
Nameless twins land on a certain planet. Led by a guide, they venture into a mysterious world in search of their mother, whom they have never met. However, their path begins to crumble under the weight of their mother's grief.

(Source: Official site, translated)
data.background: Moshi, Korekara Umareru no Nara was released as part of Toho's GEMSTONE Creative Label GEMNIBUS vol.2 anthology. It is the only animated film in the lineup.

data.title: Two Faced
data.synopsis: Promotional music video featuring the song Two Faced by LUCY announcing that the manhwa Your Throne will return on March 31 after roughly a 15-month hiatus.

data.title: Tank Chair
data.synopsis:
Shizuka takes on the most dangerous of assassin jobs, but she's not the one doing the killing. Rather, it's her brother, Nagi, a strong assassin who took a bullet to protect his sister, leaving him in a comatose state and having to use a wheelchair. However, Shizuka has figured out the key to waking her brother up: he must be faced with killing intent! Thus begins a violent journey of recovery, battling the most dangerous foes!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

titles.title: Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohan Tabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car wo Shoukan shimashita
捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
The Forsaken Saintess and her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World

data.title: Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohan Tabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car wo Shoukan shimashita
data.title_english: The Forsaken Saintess and her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World
data.title_japanese: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
data.synopsis:
Rin Takanashi, a caregiver in her thirties, was unceremoniously discarded as "trash" despite being summoned as a saint.

However, as a lover of the great outdoors and all things camping, she was blessed with a special skill, [Survival], as well as another unique skill! Thus, a riveting tale begins: one of sweat, tears, and insatiable hunger as Rin, together with companions she picked up along the way, leisurely explores this parallel world and savors gourmet cuisine to her heart's content...

Or so the story should have gone, but it looks like their road is going in an unexpected direction...?

(Source: MU)
